segments.text: Yeah, luckily DI'd to the right instead of in, because if he had DI'd in, he would have, I think, died to an up B.
Probably. Oh, go for the grab there, and it doesn't matter if you don't get an up B.

full_text: Yeah, luckily DI'd to the right instead of in, because if he had DI'd in, he would have, I think, died to an up B. Probably. Oh, go for the grab there, and it doesn't matter if you don't get an up B.
